translations.en: O! Hisham indeed Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna not tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna and hb lna from ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh and t'wd to 'maha and rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah and who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart upon m'rfh thabth he sees it and he finds hqyqtha in his heart and not is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa and srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate upon albatn alkhfy from the intellect except bzahr from it and natq from him O! Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous from the intellect and what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr and evil from it mamwnan and right guidance and alkhyr from it mamwlan and fdl his wealth mbdhwl and fdl His saying mkfwf and nsybh from the worldly life alqwt not is satiated from knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah from might with ghyrh and humility more beloved to him from honor considers much little alm'rwf from ghyrh and considers little kthyr alm'rwf from himself and he sees the people klhm good from it and that he/it shrhm in himself and he/it tmam alamr
translations.ur: اے Hisham بے شک Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna نہیں tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna اور hb lna سے ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh اور t'wd طرف 'maha اور rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah اور who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart پر m'rfh thabth he sees it اور he finds hqyqtha میں his heart اور نہیں is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa اور srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate پر albatn alkhfy سے the intellect except bzahr from it اور natq from him اے Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous سے the intellect اور what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr اور evil from it mamwnan اور right guidance اور alkhyr from it mamwlan اور fdl his wealth mbdhwl اور fdl His saying mkfwf اور nsybh سے the worldly life alqwt نہیں is satiated سے knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah سے might with ghyrh اور humility more beloved to him سے honor considers much little alm'rwf سے ghyrh اور considers little kthyr alm'rwf سے himself اور he sees the people klhm good from it اور that he/it shrhm میں himself اور he/it tmam alamr
translations.tr: ey Hisham muhakkak Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna değil tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna ve hb lna -den ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh ve t'wd -e 'maha ve rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah ve who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart üzerine m'rfh thabth he sees it ve he finds hqyqtha içinde his heart ve değil is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa ve srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate üzerine albatn alkhfy -den the intellect except bzahr from it ve natq from him ey Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous -den the intellect ve what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr ve evil from it mamwnan ve right guidance ve alkhyr from it mamwlan ve fdl his wealth mbdhwl ve fdl His saying mkfwf ve nsybh -den the worldly life alqwt değil is satiated -den knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah -den might with ghyrh ve humility more beloved to him -den honor considers much little alm'rwf -den ghyrh ve considers little kthyr alm'rwf -den himself ve he sees the people klhm good from it ve that he/it shrhm içinde himself ve he/it tmam alamr
translations.fa: ای Hisham به درستی Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna نه tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna و hb lna از ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh و t'wd به سوی 'maha و rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah و who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart بر m'rfh thabth he sees it و he finds hqyqtha در his heart و نه is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa و srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate بر albatn alkhfy از the intellect except bzahr from it و natq from him ای Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous از the intellect و what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr و evil from it mamwnan و right guidance و alkhyr from it mamwlan و fdl his wealth mbdhwl و fdl His saying mkfwf و nsybh از the worldly life alqwt نه is satiated از knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah از might with ghyrh و humility more beloved to him از honor considers much little alm'rwf از ghyrh و considers little kthyr alm'rwf از himself و he sees the people klhm good from it و that he/it shrhm در himself و he/it tmam alamr
translations.id: wahai Hisham sesungguhnya Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna tidak tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna dan hb lna dari ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh dan t'wd kepada 'maha dan rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah dan who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart atas m'rfh thabth he sees it dan he finds hqyqtha di dalam his heart dan tidak is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa dan srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate atas albatn alkhfy dari the intellect except bzahr from it dan natq from him wahai Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous dari the intellect dan what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr dan evil from it mamwnan dan right guidance dan alkhyr from it mamwlan dan fdl his wealth mbdhwl dan fdl His saying mkfwf dan nsybh dari the worldly life alqwt tidak is satiated dari knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah dari might with ghyrh dan humility more beloved to him dari honor considers much little alm'rwf dari ghyrh dan considers little kthyr alm'rwf dari himself dan he sees the people klhm good from it dan that he/it shrhm di dalam himself dan he/it tmam alamr
translations.bn: হে Hisham নিশ্চয়ই Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna না tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna এবং hb lna থেকে ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh এবং t'wd দিকে 'maha এবং rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah এবং who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart উপর m'rfh thabth he sees it এবং he finds hqyqtha মধ্যে his heart এবং না is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa এবং srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate উপর albatn alkhfy থেকে the intellect except bzahr from it এবং natq from him হে Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous থেকে the intellect এবং what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr এবং evil from it mamwnan এবং right guidance এবং alkhyr from it mamwlan এবং fdl his wealth mbdhwl এবং fdl His saying mkfwf এবং nsybh থেকে the worldly life alqwt না is satiated থেকে knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah থেকে might with ghyrh এবং humility more beloved to him থেকে honor considers much little alm'rwf থেকে ghyrh এবং considers little kthyr alm'rwf থেকে himself এবং he sees the people klhm good from it এবং that he/it shrhm মধ্যে himself এবং he/it tmam alamr
translations.es: oh Hisham ciertamente Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna no tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna y hb lna de ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh y t'wd hacia 'maha y rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah y who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart sobre m'rfh thabth he sees it y he finds hqyqtha en his heart y no is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa y srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate sobre albatn alkhfy de the intellect except bzahr from it y natq from him oh Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous de the intellect y what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr y evil from it mamwnan y right guidance y alkhyr from it mamwlan y fdl his wealth mbdhwl y fdl His saying mkfwf y nsybh de the worldly life alqwt no is satiated de knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah de might with ghyrh y humility more beloved to him de honor considers much little alm'rwf de ghyrh y considers little kthyr alm'rwf de himself y he sees the people klhm good from it y that he/it shrhm en himself y he/it tmam alamr
translations.fr: ô Hisham certes Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna non tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna et hb lna de ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh et t'wd vers 'maha et rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah et who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart sur m'rfh thabth he sees it et he finds hqyqtha dans his heart et non is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa et srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate sur albatn alkhfy de the intellect except bzahr from it et natq from him ô Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous de the intellect et what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr et evil from it mamwnan et right guidance et alkhyr from it mamwlan et fdl his wealth mbdhwl et fdl His saying mkfwf et nsybh de the worldly life alqwt non is satiated de knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah de might with ghyrh et humility more beloved to him de honor considers much little alm'rwf de ghyrh et considers little kthyr alm'rwf de himself et he sees the people klhm good from it et that he/it shrhm dans himself et he/it tmam alamr
translations.de: o Hisham wahrlich Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna nicht tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna und hb lna von ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh und t'wd zu 'maha und rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah und who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart auf m'rfh thabth he sees it und he finds hqyqtha in his heart und nicht is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa und srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate auf albatn alkhfy von the intellect except bzahr from it und natq from him o Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous von the intellect und what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr und evil from it mamwnan und right guidance und alkhyr from it mamwlan und fdl his wealth mbdhwl und fdl His saying mkfwf und nsybh von the worldly life alqwt nicht is satiated von knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah von might with ghyrh und humility more beloved to him von honor considers much little alm'rwf von ghyrh und considers little kthyr alm'rwf von himself und he sees the people klhm good from it und that he/it shrhm in himself und he/it tmam alamr
translations.ru: о Hisham поистине Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna не tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna и hb lna из ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh и t'wd к 'maha и rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah и who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart на m'rfh thabth he sees it и he finds hqyqtha в his heart и не is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa и srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate на albatn alkhfy из the intellect except bzahr from it и natq from him о Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous из the intellect и what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr и evil from it mamwnan и right guidance и alkhyr from it mamwlan и fdl his wealth mbdhwl и fdl His saying mkfwf и nsybh из the worldly life alqwt не is satiated из knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah из might with ghyrh и humility more beloved to him из honor considers much little alm'rwf из ghyrh и considers little kthyr alm'rwf из himself и he sees the people klhm good from it и that he/it shrhm в himself и he/it tmam alamr
translations.zh: 啊 Hisham 确实 Allah hka from a people salhyn that they qalwa rbna 不 tzgh qlwbna after since/when hdytna 和 hb lna 从 ldnk rhmh indeed you you alwhab hyn they knew that alqlwb tzygh 和 t'wd 向 'maha 和 rdaha indeed he/it did not fears Allah who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah 和 who/whoever did not he reasons from/about of Allah did not ties/resolves his heart 在...上 m'rfh thabth he sees it 和 he finds hqyqtha 在 his heart 和 不 is/will be anyone likewise except who/whoever was qwlh lf'lh msdqa 和 srh l'lanyth mwafqa because Allah Blessed be his name did not indicate 在...上 albatn alkhfy 从 the intellect except bzahr from it 和 natq from him 啊 Hisham was Commander the Believers ( upon him be peace ) he says what/not 'bd Allah bshy‏' most virtuous 从 the intellect 和 what/not tm 'ql amr' until to be in it khsal shta alkfr 和 evil from it mamwnan 和 right guidance 和 alkhyr from it mamwlan 和 fdl his wealth mbdhwl 和 fdl His saying mkfwf 和 nsybh 从 the worldly life alqwt 不 is satiated 从 knowledge dhrh humiliation more beloved to him with of Allah 从 might with ghyrh 和 humility more beloved to him 从 honor considers much little alm'rwf 从 ghyrh 和 considers little kthyr alm'rwf 从 himself 和 he sees the people klhm good from it 和 that he/it shrhm 在 himself 和 he/it tmam alamr
